payload.action_summary: Klimat: reorder flank chips — left HVAC modes (cool/heat/dry/fan_only/auto) + Power; right fan speeds (auto/low/med/high) + Горіз./Верт. swings (Option 1 trial: Power left bottom). Both ACs via shared climate_thermostat cols.
preserve_behavior: floor room mosaic packing via custom:masonry-layout with disable-floor header sibling above
TEMP slider heat/cool gate unchanged (pointer-events + opacity)
timer View Independence phone Force Native wheels vs desktop dual vertical HACS TEMP chrome
chip services unchanged: mode/fan one-shot set; swing axis toggle; power turn_on/off
both Kabinet and Spalnia via shared climate_left_col / climate_right_col
evidence: HA climate.set_hvac_mode / set_fan_mode / set_swing_mode / set_swing_horizontal_mode / turn_on / turn_off — https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/climate/
Existing chips: climate_mode_chip, climate_attrib_chip, climate_swing_axis_chip, climate_power_btn — reorder only, no new services

constraints.acceptance: Left top→bottom: Холод Тепло Сухе Вент. Авто(HVAC) Жив.; Right: Авто(fan) Низ. Сер. Вис. Горіз. Верт.; chip chrome/services unchanged; both Kabinet and Spalnia
